title: astragalus lineatus
intro: Astragalus lineatus, also known as the Chinese milkvetch or Lineated milkvetch, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of China and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus lineatus are said to include reducing fatigue and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. Astragalus lineatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried root extracts, capsules, and tea, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
